insertions.translation_zh: Notice of Annual General Meeting
insertions.target_text: Notice of Annual General Meeting

insertions.translation_zh: This is to inform that Jianye New Life Co., Ltd. (the "Company") is hereby scheduled to start business on June 1, 2026 (Monday) 10:00 Noon: 16th Floor, Tower 2, Gateway Tower, Harbor City, 25 Canton Road, Tsim Sha Tsui, Kowloon, Hong Kong The Annual General Meeting (the “Meeting”) is held in Rooms 1602–1605 to deal with the following matters: 1. To review and approve the audited consolidated financial statements for the financial year ended December 31, 2025 and A meeting of the directors of the Company (the “Directors”) and a report of the Company’s independent auditors. 2. (A) To re-elect Mr. Yan Xuewen as executive director.
insertions.target_text: This is to inform that Jianye New Life Co., Ltd. (the "Company") is hereby scheduled to start business on June 1, 2026 (Monday) 10:00 Noon: 16th Floor, Tower 2, Gateway Tower, Harbor City, 25 Canton Road, Tsim Sha Tsui, Kowloon, Hong Kong The Annual General Meeting (the “Meeting”) is held in Rooms 1602–1605 to deal with the following matters: 1. To review and approve the audited consolidated financial statements for the financial year ended December 31, 2025 and A meeting of the directors of the Company (the “Directors”) and a report of the Company’s independent auditors. 2. (A) To re-elect Mr. Yan Xuewen as executive director.

background_cover.reason: cover multiline source redaction bands with one continuous local background before target text insertion

insertions.translation_zh:
(B) To re-elect Mr. Liang Xiang as an independent non-executive director.

(D) Authorize the board of directors (the "Board") to determine the remuneration of each Director.
